title: Chromosome segregation protein of Streptococcus mutans reshapes cell wall
author: Zhang, hongyu
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
RNA-seq Data and R Code Description  This dataset includes RNA-seq data for Streptococcus mutans smc gene mutants and R code used for growth dynamics analysis. The experimental details are as follows: 
  Growth Dynamics  Mid-logarithmic phase cells were analyzed using a microplate reader (Cerillo, USA). Growth dynamics were determined using the R Studio package ( https://cran.rstudio.com ). 
  RNA Extraction and RNA-seq Analysis  RNA extraction and RNA sequencing (RNA-seq, Illumina HiSeq sequencing platform), along with bioinformatics analysis (DESeq2, DEGseq, or edgeR), were performed by Shanghai Meiji Biomedical Technology.
